'''Desstious''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="WbC">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]</ref> located in the [[Desstious system/Legends|Desstious system]], a part of the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Par Lankin]], who was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="WbC" /> in [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]].<ref name="Date">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], and as the former work establishes [[Par Lankin]] to be age 57, he must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]].</ref> Lankin's homeworld was noted in ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that served as a compilation of reports on various threats to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was published<ref name="WbC" /> in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].<ref name="Date" />

==Behind the scenes==
Desstious was mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which was written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Desstious [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Desstious itself, in grid square P-16.<ref name="TEA" />
